allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from autocoder import logger; logger.init\(level='debug'\); logger.debug\('test_debug', a=1\); logger.info\('test_info', b=2\); logger.warn\('test_warn', c=3\); logger.llm_call\(model='phi4:14b', purpose='test', in_tokens=100, out_tokens=50, duration_s=1.5\); print\('--- safe_url ---'\); print\(logger.safe_url\('https://app.example.com/login?token=secret&u=me#frag'\)\)")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: d = json.loads\(line\) except: continue keys = ['event','slug','func','body','intent','total_tokens','duration','cached','applied','stubs'] print\(' | '.join\(f'{k}={d.get\(k\)}' for k in keys if k in d\)\)")

Bash(python -c " import os from dotenv import load_dotenv load_dotenv\('.env'\) ai_keys = ['OLLAMA_ENDPOINT','OLLAMA_MODEL','OLLAMA_NUM_CTX','OLLAMA_TEMPERATURE','OLLAMA_NUM_PREDICT','OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_SECONDS','OLLAMA_TOP_P', 'OPENAI_API_KEY','OPENAI_BASE_URL','ANTHROPIC_API_KEY','GOOGLE_API_KEY','HF_TOKEN','HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN','COHERE_API_KEY','REPLICATE_API_TOKEN', 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY','AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT','LITELLM_PROXY','LANGSMITH_API_KEY','LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY'] for k in ai_keys: v = os.environ.get\(k, ''\) print\(f' {k:30s} present={bool\(v.strip\(\)\)}', end=''\) if k.startswith\('OLLAMA_ENDPOINT'\) and v: print\(f' value={v}', end=''\) elif k.startswith\('OLLAMA_MODEL'\) and v: print\(f' value={v}', end=''\) print\(\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); [print\(f'  {k} -> {v}'\) for k,v in d.items\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "from autocoder.llm.prompts import build_feature_prompt, build_ui_inventory, FEATURE_SYSTEM; from autocoder.report import build_report, ReportData; from autocoder.cli import cli; print\('ok'\)")
